name: Twitter Bookmark Analyzer
tagline: Twitter intelligence platform — 30K+ bookmarks analyzed, DM funnel scoring, monetization detection, 8-page Streamlit dashboard
description: Scrapes Twitter bookmarks via Chrome remote debugging. SQLite database with 6 tables and 16 indexes. DM funnel: weighted lead scoring, pipeline tracking (bookmarked→followed→DM→converted), outreach list generation. Content analyzer: 12 topic categories, trending themes, content gap analysis. Monetization detector: identifies 8 revenue types (course, coaching, SaaS, newsletter), extracts pricing signals. 8-page Streamlit dashboard with network graphs and heatmaps. Migrated 30,765 bookmarks + 295 accounts.
